provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Conveyancing Act.

provisions.title: Application of the Conveyancing Act, 1911 (1 and 2 Geo. 5. c. 37)
provisions.content: (1) The Conveyancing Act, 1911, of the United Kingdom, is hereby applied to Malawi: Provided that the said Act shall not apply to land registered in accordance with the Registered Land Act. (2) In the application of the said Act to Malawi, references therein to “the court” shall be construed as references to the High Court of Malawi.
